form.formComment: Having her second run back from a spell. Game effort when 3rd (Fr1) over 1690m after showing early speed at this track, beaten 2 m by Master Louey (2:04.30) in 3yo MAIDEN on April 2 at $12. Will be better for that hitout and draws well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Having her second run back from a spell. Game effort when 3rd (Fr1) over 1690m after showing early speed at this track, beaten 2 m by Master Louey (2:04.30) in 3yo MAIDEN on April 2 at $12. Will be better for that hitout and draws well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait clear of interference upon entering the first turn.
Hung in after the start and broke gait. Hung in at the 1100m.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr4) over 1690m after racing wide at this track, beaten 19 m by Master Louey (2:04.30) in 3yo MAIDEN on April 2 at $51. Two runs back game effort when 3rd (Fr1) over 1790m after showing early speed at Mildura, at the bell was 3rd-4.2m on the pegs beaten 17 m by Poppy Lane (2:11.50) in 2-3yo MAIDEN on December 30 at $6. Fitter and draws well so looking for better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr4) over 1690m after racing wide at this track, beaten 19 m by Master Louey (2:04.30) in 3yo MAIDEN on April 2 at $51. Fitter and draws well so looking for better.

form.formComment: Tired badly when resuming on April 8 at Bendigo behind All Over It over 2150m MAIDEN. Unlikely to threaten.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Tired badly when resuming on April 8 at Bendigo behind All Over It over 2150m MAIDEN. Unlikely to threaten.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired over the concluding stages of the event to be beaten in excess of 70m.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth behind Our Sweet Jeannie at Shepparton over 2190m in a MAIDEN on March 17 at $4.20. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Shiffrin at Bendigo over 2150m in a 3yo MAIDEN on March 25 at $2. Could be ready to strike.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running on the final turn prior to utilising sprint lane.
Inconvenienced in the final lap, tired and beaten 87m.
Gave ground over the concluding stages to be beaten some distance.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Sr4) over 2200m at Ballarat, beaten 50 m by Roman Charlie (2:44.40) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on April 9 at $31. Two runs back 5th (Sr3) over 2150m at Bendigo, beaten 24 m by Jacquelyn Joy (2:39.70) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on April 1 at $26. Must do a lot more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Locked wheels momentarily with Illbeyourlovertwo at approximately the 250m.
Held up for clear running during the early stages of the run to the finish.

form.formComment: Two-year-old filly by Captain Crunch out of Moet Girl having her first start. Finished second in a trial on April 9 at Shepparton over 1690m. In a good yard and could kick off with a win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two-year-old filly by Captain Crunch out of Moet Girl having her first start. Finished second in a trial on April 9 at Shepparton over 1690m. In a good yard and could kick off with a win.

form.formComment: Last start 11th (Fr3) over 2240m at Melton, beaten 35 m by Mount Barker Boy (2:43.00) in 3yo No NR on April 10 at $126. At the start before game effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr5) over 2190m at Maryborough was 7th-11.2 at the bell, beaten 4.5 m by Colosimo (2:42.20) in 3yo 10 0K on March 16 at $31. Better placed so is among the chances.

form.formComment: Second up after running 6th (Sr1) over 1690m at this track, beaten 18 m by Master Louey (2:04.30) in 3yo MAIDEN on April 2 at $61. May need more racing.
